ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "trade_date" TEXT /* The date on which the trade occurred */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price reached during the trade day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price reached during the trade day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" TEXT /* The closing price adjusted for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend_amount" TEXT /* The amount of dividends paid on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* The ratio of the stock split on the given date */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* The time interval of the data (daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_date", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the instrument */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector in which the financial instrument operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry in which the financial instrument operates */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the instrument information was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the instrument (active, delisted, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_market FOREIGN KEY ("market") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the market */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the market */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the market */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the market is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the market information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "initial_investment" TEXT /* The initial investment amount for the portfolio */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* The current value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the portfolio was updated */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level of the portfolio (low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* The price at which the instrument was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* The date the instrument was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the portfolio instrument information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument analyzed in the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stored report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., performance, risk assessment) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* The status of the report (draft, finalized, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the report was updated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* The user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument related to the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "alert_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert has been sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (price, volume, news, etc.) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the alert should be checked (real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* The last date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the alert settings were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument related to the news */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the full news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* The sentiment of the news article (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* The impact level of the news on the instrument (low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the indicator */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the economic indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the indicator was updated */,
  "units" TEXT /* The units in which the indicator is measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_instruments" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument influenced by the indicator */,
  "impact_factor" TEXT /* The factor by which the indicator impacts the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "API_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* The last date and time the data source was synced */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the data source should be synced (real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the data source information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
